name: ResourcesMonthView
description: Month view with resource lanes for scheduling across resources
searchText: resourcesmonthview month view with resource lanes for scheduling across resources @mantine/schedule /schedule/resources-month-view candragevent date daywidth events grouplabelwidth groups highlighttoday labels locale maxeventspertimeslot mode monthyearselectprops moreeventsprops nextcontrolprops ondatechange ondayclick oneventclick oneventdragend oneventdragstart oneventdrop onexternaleventdrop onslotdragend onviewchange previouscontrolprops radius recurrenceexpansionlimit renderevent rendereventbody rendergrouplabel renderresourcelabel resources rowheight scrollareaprops startscrolldate todaycontrolprops viewselectprops weekdayformat weekenddays withdragslotselect witheventsdraganddrop withheader withweekenddays

props.name: canDragEvent
props.description: Function to determine if event can be dragged

props.name: date
props.description: Date to display, Date object or date string in YYYY-MM-DD format

props.name: dayWidth
props.description: Width of each day column

props.name: events
props.description: Events to display

props.name: groupLabelWidth
props.description: Width of the group label column

props.name: groups
props.description: List of resource groups to display as a column to the left of resource labels

props.name: highlightToday
props.description: If set, highlights the current day

props.name: labels
props.description: Labels override for i18n

props.name: locale
props.description: Locale passed down to dayjs

props.name: maxEventsPerTimeSlot
props.description: Maximum number of events visible per cell before "+more" indicator

props.name: mode
props.description: Interaction mode

props.name: monthYearSelectProps
props.description: Props passed down to MonthYearSelect component

props.name: moreEventsProps
props.description: Props passed down to MoreEvents component

props.name: nextControlProps
props.description: Props passed to next control

props.name: onDateChange
props.description: Called with the new date value when a date is selected

props.name: onDayClick
props.description: Called when a cell is clicked, includes resourceId

type.name: ((data: { date: string; nativeEvent: MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement, MouseEvent>; resourceId?: string | number; }) => void) | undefined

props.name: onEventClick
props.description: Called when event is clicked

props.name: onEventDragEnd
props.description: Called when any event drag ends

props.name: onEventDragStart
props.description: Called when any event drag starts

props.name: onEventDrop
props.description: Called when event is dropped, includes target resourceId

type.name: ((data: { eventId: string | number; newStart: string; newEnd: string; event: ScheduleEventData; resourceId?: string | number; }) => void) | undefined

props.name: onExternalEventDrop
props.description: Called when an external item is dropped

type.name: ((data: { dataTransfer: DataTransfer; dropDateTime: string; resourceId?: string | number; }) => void) | undefined

props.name: onSlotDragEnd
props.description: Called when a day range is selected by dragging, includes resourceId

type.name: ((data: { rangeStart: string; rangeEnd: string; resourceId?: string | number; }) => void) | undefined

props.name: onViewChange
props.description: Called when view level select button is clicked

props.name: previousControlProps
props.description: Props passed to previous control

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: recurrenceExpansionLimit
props.description: Max number of generated recurring instances

props.name: renderEvent
props.description: Function to fully customize event rendering

props.name: renderEventBody
props.description: Function to customize event body

props.name: renderGroupLabel
props.description: Function to customize group label rendering

props.name: renderResourceLabel
props.description: Function to customize resource label rendering

props.name: resources
props.description: List of resources to display as rows

props.name: rowHeight
props.description: Height of each resource row

props.name: scrollAreaProps
props.description: Props passed down to ScrollArea component

props.name: startScrollDate
props.description: Date to scroll to on initial render, in YYYY-MM-DD format

props.name: todayControlProps
props.description: Props passed to today control

props.name: viewSelectProps
props.description: Props passed to view level select

props.name: weekdayFormat
props.description: dayjs format for weekdays in day column headers

props.name: weekendDays
props.description: Indices of weekend days

props.name: withDragSlotSelect
props.description: If set, enables drag-to-select day ranges

props.name: withEventsDragAndDrop
props.description: If true, events can be dragged and dropped

props.name: withHeader
props.description: If set, the header is displayed

props.name: withWeekendDays
props.description: If set to false, weekend days are hidden
